comment.body:
I fully believe in the bigger picture that Alma has laid out why we went down these weeks and a bounce is expected and then a bigger drop. 
We have had both cooler cpi and ppi and back a few months we would have gapped up 100 points and rally hard after that.
But so far it's just a tiny bump. 
So, this makes me even more condident that her analyse is correct (one can't just swallow everything but question ideas on internet)
